title: ECLECTIC RESONANCE Detuned Alloy 2
specification: 15x15cm Download Card / Original Rock & Acoustic Compilation
price: Pre-Order & Event Price: 12€ / 2000 yen | Shop Price: 15€ / 2500 yen + tax

01.title: Delirium
description: • Guitars (Abasi Consepts Larada J8, Strandberg Boden Standard NX 6 Tremolo): stuv
• Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by stuv
• Additional Mastering Engineer: Tape simulator for warmth and brightness, dynamic EQ for balance, multiband saturation for a tighter sound and master limiting
• Used VSTs & Samples: Neural DSP(Misha / Abasi / Gojira / Parallax ), Mixwave(Mike Stringer / Manuel Gardner Fernandes), GGD Studio Cabs Contenders Round 1,Superior Drummer 3, Mixwave Luke Holland
• About this track: I should at least be allowed to be happy when I look at illusions [幻を見ている間くらいは幸せな気分でいてもいいはずだ]

02.title: My Yandere GF Doesn't Seem To Go On Murder Sprees in Harajuku. I Want a Refund!
description: • Vocals: Teto Kasane [重音テト], Yumenokessho PASTEL [夢ノ結唱PASTEL], Ayame, Nakuru [無來], Moka Miyamai [宮舞モカ]
• Programmed, Produced & Mixed by Mei Naganowa
• Used VSTs & Samples: Kontakt 7, Serum, Nexus, EZBass

• About this track: CRABCORE IS BACK Y'ALL! This time it has implied Yuri and... alt-idols, because they are basically crabcore if you insist. think about it, there ARE similarities between alt-idol metal and early-10s electronic metalcore...
tell me, how can I learn to be as heartless as you
so I can be prepared for the next time
what can I do to prevent ending up with empty hands again
I've held on to you for what seems to be my entire time of life
what's there to defend when it was doomed from the start?
promises as empty as a forgotten hourglass
just leave your stuff at the door
please make yourself comfortable, I invite you to sink as low as me
the scam phone line of relation
who's the fraudster behind all this, I just wanna talk with them.
tell me, how can I learn to be as heartless as you
so I can be prepared for the next time
what can I do to prevent ending up with empty hands again
Do you think you can crawl back to me as if nothing ever happened?
you thought I can't do this at all on my own?
Our dignety died with your lies, you can have it back
tell me, how can I learn to be as heartless as you
so I can be prepared for the next time
what can I do to prevent ending up with empty hands again
You tought me how to be a girl again (I guess I needed this)
You tought me how to be a girl again
regretfulness, resentment, this is what disillusionment sounds like
tell me, how can I learn to be as heartless as you
so I can be prepared for the next time
what can I do to prevent ending up empty
I'm done holding my head up high (broken free from what turned out to be nothing)
all this to prevent ending up with empty hands again

03.title: I Hate You, Yesterday
description: • Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Aiyru

• Additional Mastering: -10.6dB of clip gain to avoid clipping. Bus compression for glue, dynamic EQ for balance, multiband saturation for a tighter sound, Vitalizer for subtle stereo width and master limiting

04.title: Voidwalker
description: Shadow of truth, invisible to anyone's eyes
Footprints left stronger by what was carried
The surfacing representations were sickeningly vivid
Exist devoid of shadows and inorganic
The stars that bear no light
mercilessly proclaim eternity again today, unchanged
Holding a hand over it, I perceive distortion in space
Even if it is remembered, there is no guarantee of its correctness
I don't want to betray the present moment
It blooms whether one wishes it or not
Averting one's gaze, it forms as desired
I had wished for you to call my name, thereby proving my existence
The surfacing representations were sickeningly vivid
Exist devoid of shadows and inorganic
Melting into the stars that do not shine, witnessing the finite
Shadow of truth, invisible to anyone's eyes
It's better if only I know
To stand in the shadows and illuminate
Exhilarated in the face of death
All discomfort makes one feel alive
Showing existence, making eye contact and conversing

title.en: Until the Error Becomes the Optimal Solution
title.jp: 誤差が最適解になるまでで

description: • Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by intelligencecasino
• Additional Mastering: 1.4dB additional limiting to bring the loudness up to par

Eden Forscythe: I think this track has a really interesting quality to it, like soaring through a vast blue synthetic sky full of sci-fi hologram cubes... At least, I envisioned that a lot when I was singing, which makes it somehow refreshing in spite of the dire theme. I think that contrast is what makes it enjoyable.
薬まだ効いてる気しないな
ぶっちゃけ、舌の上で回る
失敗の級数　分割された章
配列は崩壊 収束しない証明
雲の振幅に揺られ　浄化のない領域
「救え」という口は閉じられ　鍵穴だけが増殖する
わたしの歩幅は兵站　転ぶたび世界が前進する
その瞬間 尊さは売却済み　誰も私を助けない
顔面に刻まれた　切断面
赤いコチニールが滴り
戦争が平和として評価され
無数の亀裂を引き裂いて
やってきたこと全てが 罰のように　逆流する
秩序が虚偽なら 生は拒絶でしかない
私は　燃えるために飛ぶ 赤い傷を記録する
わたしの鼓動は補給路　躓くたび地図が塗り替わる
その瞬間　祈りは質入れ済み　誰もわたしを抱き上げない

06.title: Silver Willows
description: • Lead Electric Guitar 1: Zohar Emulator (Pixel Mixers)
• Lead Electric Guitar 2 & Lead Acoustic Guitar: Rämillia
• Programmed, Produced & Mixed by Zohar Emulator (Pixel Mixers)
• Used VSTs & Samples: Perfect Drums, Xpand!2, Archetype Petrucci X, Ignite Emissary

• About this track: The chorus melody was the first part I came up when I started arranging this track. By pure chance, I ended up expanding on it with a somber acoustic intro and a rock/metal second part, creating some sort of musical journey towards heaviness, which I find fitting for the overall theme of the album. Bottom line: everything will eventually turn to metal.

07.title: GET IT TWISTED
description: • About this track: After YGGDRASIL I didn't think I had in me to make a full song so soon, but I somehow got inspired by the progress of the project and managed to come up with solid ideas super quickly. It was intended to be a fully instrumental arrangement at first, but I wasn't satisfied with what I could come up with for verses, and when I started thinking about adding vocals the lyrics ideas flowed very fast so I went with them
Your heroes of light have shown you their true nature
A facade of good will just to hide their crimes
You believed their lies, and followed in their footsteps
You've looked up to them and now you shall look down
Your oath is now broken, your life's on the line
What felt like a sin now's your chance to survive
You've sharpened steel before but not to this end
It's time to find your own path to thread
Is this what I'm looking for? (I've always been waiting for you)
Is this truly my destiny? (I've always been waiting for you)
It's always been waiting for you
Now draw your blade, and stain it with blood
It's only a matter of time
The voices are coming after me
There's no other way but down
I will never delve in too deep
Even on top it feels worse than before
The world knows your name and it's waiting for more
What once was your flame is now burning your skin
Your dresses once blackened now bleached in the sun
If this is part of some twisted cycle of fate
Remember there is no other way but down
Can you dig a deeper grave than your own?
Is this what I'm looking for?
It's always been waiting for you
Now draw your blade, and stain it with blood
It's only a matter of time
The voices are now cowering in fear
There's no other way but down
Death is now but making one with me
Time Signature: Various (mostly 4/4 for vocal sections)
Key: mostly B minor for choruses and A minor for verses and pre-choruses, bridge shifts around a bunch

08.title: Black Tooth Swagger
description: • Used Software: Logic Pro / Pro Tools

• About this track: Inspired by classic hard rock and blues, Black Tooth Swagger depicts a suspicious but charismatic badass, drenched in filth and booze but oozing the charm and funk to get by through life. Probably wears a dirty trench coat too.
Genre: Classic blues based hard rock

09.title: HEAVENGINE
description: • Composer, Arranger & Lyrics: Arman Aspromonti (Resonant Union)
• Electric Guitar & Synths: Arman Aspromonti (Resonant Union)
• Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Arman Aspromonti (Resonant Union)
• Used VSTs & Samples: IK Multimedia Amplitube 5, KORG Prophecy, Native Instruments FM8, BFD3, Prominy SR5 Rock Bass

R-Man: In a place outside time and space, two people drive down an endless highway with no goal in sight and no company other than each other and a sun that's permanently suspended just above the horizon. They don't know how they got there, or where they're going, but they take a strange kind of comfort in knowing the only thing ahead of them is certain doom.
I caught a glimpse of your smile,
Our journey to nowhere goes on and on.
The lamps that light the highway,
They shine like stars on the endless road ahead.
Road to the new world goes on and on.
Why does the moon chase the sun?
to see a future where we'd survive.
cut the past away from us.

10.title: Absolute Break
description: • Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Ibnu Kusanagi
• Additional Mastering: Bus compression for glue, dynamic EQ for balance, multiband saturation for a tighter sound and master limiting
• Used VSTs & Samples: Superior Drummer 3, Soundiron Voices of Rage (KONTAKT), Ample Metal Eclipse, Ample Metal Ray5, xFer Serum2

11.title: A Whole Lotta Nothin'
description: • Composer, Arranger, Vocals & Lyrics: Yumi Sakata (Holmgang Ov Gensokyo)
• Electric Guitar & Piano: Yumi Sakata (Holmgang Ov Gensokyo)
• Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Yumi Sakata (Holmgang Ov Gensokyo)
• Additional Mastering: -2.7dB gain, light dynamic EQ to tame drum transients
• Used VSTs & Samples: Neural DSP, Sylenth1, Nexus, Kontakt, GGD

• About this track: Channeling my inner BTBAM to create another progger for Detuned Alloy. This one on the shorter size but with that same Yumi formula of "the clean section". Lyrics? Read the title. It's about a whole lotta nothin'. Lyrics don't rly mean anything in today's world 🙃
live in the dark we all
seem so small when we compare
live in the dark we all
seem so small when we compete
our negation to the warmth of light
it doesn't even need to real
it doesn't even need to real at all
the fakest light brings comfort no sun could

12.title: I Hope You Step On a Lego
description: • Composer & Arranger: Maxx (Kodamasounds), Kopan (Kodamasounds), LyhNed (Kodamasounds), Nico Siberia
• Used VSTs & Samples: Archetype Misha Mansoor, Element bass, Getgood drums One Kit metal
• About this track: Have you ever felt this visceral feeling when you get betrayed by someone to the point of wishing them the worst thing you can imagine... To step on a Lego...
That's how it feels / inside of me
I bet on truth / still got screwed up
just had to face the lies
i wish these bricks fall on your foot
the hot air balloon earns a hole
you told me it was safe, so i jumped too
while I was falling of, straight to hell
I hate breathing, so the joke is on you.
This plastic place was always fake
this plastic place was always fake
IT WAS BUILT to deny it
you told me it was safe, so i jumped too
while I was falling of, straight to hell
I hate breathing, so the joke is on you.
wish you way more than shit.
misofony every time you think of me
the daggers you threw are coming in.  [I hope you step on a Lego]
misofony every time you think of me
the daggers you threw are coming in.

13.title: Beautifully Desperate
description: • Used Software: Reaper, Amped ML5, Vital
• About this track: In trying our best to impress ourselves others, we grind our thinking down to a point where the Id takes over all reason.

14.title: Don't Stop Now
description: • Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by PSYQUO (KodamaSounds)

• About this track: Whatever dreams we have, we shouldn't forget them. Things are hard. The world is difficult to live in. It's tiring even just to exist. We don't know what tomorrow brings. But we can take a rest. We can always continue tomorrow; tomorrow is always a new day. Tomorrow may be a mystery, but it can also bring surprises. The fact that we've started means we're already near. Once we're there, you'll say, “Damn, that used to be a dream. But now, we're here.“
Let it lead you throughout each day, to the
Person you could be someday, and
Though things can be a bit sad
We can’t be shattered by those things alone
(Run!) Together to the edge of the world
(Try!) To see new things that make us cry and smile
(Push!) Through all the possibilities of life
Don’t hesitate to grasp it, I will
Always be here by your side
We know that you worked like mad
What doesn't kill you makes you
It’s been a challenge, look how you have grown
And one day you’ll look back
(Run!) Together to the edge of the world
(Try!) To see new things that make us cry and smile
(Push!) Through all the possibilities of life
I know you've cried an entire bucket of tears
I know you've tried to face all of your fears
I want you to know that you are near
No need to rush, cuz we are here!
(Run!) Together to the edge of the world
(Try!) To see new things that make us cry and smile
(Push!) Through all the possibilities of life
(Run!) Together to the edge of the world (together~)
(Try!) To see new things that make us cry and smile (and?)
(Push!) Through all the possibilities of life (don’t forget it!)

15.title: Waltz for the Ocean
description: • Classical Guitar II & III: Michael Stokol (Resonant Union)
• Programmed, Produced & Mixed by Michael Stokol (Resonant Union)
• Used VSTs & Samples: FabFilter (Pro-Q 3, Pro-C 2, Saturn 2), iZotope RX 8 Voice De-noise, Logic Pro (EQ, Space Designer), IK Multimedia T-RackS 6 Bus Compressor

• About this track: I have a hyperfixation on anime scores which bring together classical guitars and water. I wrote this piece inspired by these shows back in 2023 for my university's guitar ensemble, but re-worked it with new recordings and a newly arranged percussion part by E-Sarge!

13.role: Music, Lyrics, Guitars, Synths & Mastering Engineer
